# iru_device_notes (Data Source)

List all notes associated with a specific device. Each note includes content, author, and timestamp information.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (String) The unique identifier for the Device.

### Read-Only

- `notes` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notes))

<a id="nestedatt--notes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notes`

Read-Only:

- `author` (String)
- `content` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
